---
title: "Unessay"
about:
  id: me
  template: broadside
  image: img/Antoniol__20240821-_A9_0515.jpg
---

::: {#me}
## Goals

My current goals are to obtain my PhD in Microbiology with a primary focus on wildlife conservation, ecology, and disease. My primary focuses are on genetic disease, impacts on the normal microbiome, and emerging diseases within various wildlife species. I hope to work with African wildlife once I have obtained my PhD. This unessay assignment is meant to marry my academic interests with my passion of wildlife photography. Over the course of the past 6 years, I have had the privilege of photography many different animals and here I will present relevant papers and research that has been conducted specifically on the microbiome or portion of the microbiome of various animal species. I will accompany this information with images I have taken along with a personal artist statement. 

:::

Thanks for checking out my web site!
